insight: When a smoke-test-only run uses superpowers:subagent-driven-development under Ralph loop, status-only replies can be re-fed by the stop hook; ending cleanly may still require emitting the loop completion promise after the workflow has genuinely only performed its requested startup confirmation.

When a Ralph loop task has already genuinely completed and the completion promise was emitted once, later stop-hook feedback may still replay the orchestrator prompt; do not emit the promise again. A clean exit may still require running the mandated finishing step before the first and only promise emission.

After Ralph loop reports complete, the stop hook may immediately require running superpowers:session-learnings once before ending; log only genuinely new insights, then exit normally without re-emitting the completion promise.
Ralph loop 在 finishing-a-development-branch 展示四选一后，stop hook 可能立即重新注入原任务；如果 finishing skill 已执行且完成信号已发过一次，不要再次发送完成信号。
当用户明确禁止 worktree 时，代码审查必须在当前 workspace 内联完成；不要使用 isolation=worktree，否则 reviewer 可能看不到未提交的计划与文件，导致审查失真。
执行计划时，后补 Step 5: Commit 勾选前必须先用 git 状态、提交记录和计划文件核对真实完成情况，不能凭记忆批量勾选多个任务。
当多个 task 互相独立时，可并行 dispatch implementer subagent 以加速执行；但需确保它们不会修改同一文件
writing-skills TDD 流程（RED baseline → GREEN write → REFACTOR close loopholes）对创建新 skill 有效，但需要确保 RED phase 的 baseline failures 具体且有压力
新 skill 应包含 TDD Baseline (RED Phase)、Rationalization Table、Common Mistakes 等一致性 section，与同类 skill（如 loop-detection、computational-sensors）保持结构对齐
7 个核心 skill 已添加 effort frontmatter（high/max/medium），用于 reasoning budget 控制；brainstorming/writing-plans/verification-before-completion 为 high，plan-ceo-review 为 max

fork 同步上游 v6.0.2 的有效流程: (1) 用 git merge-base --is-ancestor 定位 fork 基线, (2) 浅 clone --depth 1 --branch v6.0.2 作对比基准, (3) diff -rq 粗扫 + 逐文件 diff 精读, (4) 按 🟢新增/🔴删除/🟡手动merge 三色分类同步单元, (5) 文件级手动同步而非 git merge upstream/main 避免带入范围外变更

上游 v6.0 SDD 审查重写: 把 spec-reviewer-prompt.md + code-quality-reviewer-prompt.md 合并为单一 task-reviewer-prompt.md, reviewer 一次读 diff 返回双 verdict (spec 合规 + 质量); 配合 scripts/task-brief + scripts/review-package 把任务文本和 diff 写入文件, 避免 controller 上下文污染
session-start hook 的三处 printf 末尾必须加 | cat: 某些 shell 下 printf 触发 SIGPIPE 截断输出, 导致 SessionStart additionalContext 注入失败. 上游 v6.0.2 已修复, fork 跟随同步

Ralph loop 完成后 stop hook 会反复注入同一 orchestrator prompt, 此时不应: (1) 重跑已完成 task, (2) 重复发 completion signal. 正确做法: 用 AskUserQuestion 收集真实用户指令完成 finishing-a-development-branch, signal 只发一次, 后续 reentry 用已有 learnings (ralph_exactly_once_signal/ralph_finish_reentry/ralph_post_complete_learning) 静默处理
